summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Caramel Popcorn dashboard preview at https://caramel-pop.preview.emergentagent.com. All 11 features from the request validated end-to-end via Playwright + curl. Zero failures, zero console errors. The downloadable Chrome MV3 extension zip is reachable (HTTP 200, 20339 bytes) and contains every required file.

tests_executed.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All 10 routes (dashboard, wishlist, inspiration, looks, categories, collections, compare, reminders, insights, settings) navigate and render their *-page testid. Active item gets class 'cp-sidebar-item active' (caramel highlight).
tests_executed.dashboard_hero_and_stats: PASS - Headline 'Everything you've loved' present. All 4 stat tiles (stat-total, stat-favs, stat-wishlist-value, stat-top-cat), savetype-breakdown widget and section-recent all render.
tests_executed.wishlist_filters: PASS - FOMO chip filters to 2 cards (from 10), 'All' chip restores to 10. Sort dropdown present. Favorite button toggles without error.
tests_executed.global_search: PASS - Typing 'Rare' in topbar global-search-input filters wishlist to exactly 1 card (Rare Beauty).
tests_executed.inspiration_page: PASS - 10 inspo-* tiles render in masonry layout.
tests_executed.looks_page: PASS - 3 look-card-* items, 15 look-item-* breakdown tiles (5 per look = Top, Bottom, Footwear, Bag, Accessory).
tests_executed.compare_page: PASS - compare-table renders with 3 default compare-row-* entries; clicking a compare-toggle-* removes the corresponding row (3 -> 2).
tests_executed.collections_page: PASS - Typing 'TEST_Collection_X' + clicking New increased collection cards from 8 to 9.
tests_executed.insights_page: PASS - insights-page renders, ins-total='TOTAL SAVED 10', ins-value='WISHLIST VALUE ₹1,32,684' (starts with ₹), 9 recharts SVGs rendered (BarCharts + PieChart).
tests_executed.settings_download_extension: PASS - download-extension-btn href='/caramel-popcorn-extension.zip'. curl HEAD on https://caramel-pop.preview.emergentagent.com/caramel-popcorn-extension.zip returns HTTP/2 200, content-type=application/zip, content-length=20339.
tests_executed.extension_zip_contents: PASS - zip contains manifest.json, popup/popup.html, background/service-worker.js, content-scripts/inject.js, dashboard/dashboard.html (plus icons, css, js, README).
tests_executed.add_modal_flow: PASS - topbar-add-save-btn opens add-modal; filling Title='Test Lipstick', Brand='Test Brand', Price='999' and submitting via add-modal-submit adds new item to the top of section-recent (verified 'Test Lipstick' text in first recent card and also visible as top item with ₹999 on Wishlist). NOTE: section-recent visible count remained 8 because the section appears capped at 8 most-recent items, but the new item correctly appears at position 1 - this is expected behaviour, not a bug.
tests_executed.console_errors: PASS - 0 console errors across all route navigations.

critical_code_review_comments: No critical issues found. App is well structured with consistent data-testid coverage on all interactive and informational elements - made automated testing trivial.

Minor observation: section-recent on Dashboard caps at 8 cards (newest item replaces oldest in the visible slice). If this is intended, ignore; otherwise consider exposing a 'View all' link to wishlist.
All AI features are MOCKED via rule-based stubs in /app/frontend/src/services/aiStub.js per user choice (a)/(c) - this is expected and documented.
seed_data_creation: App self-seeds sample products/looks/inspiration into localStorage on first load. Test added 1 product ('Test Lipstick' / 'Test Brand' / ₹999) and 1 collection ('TEST_Collection_X') to live preview localStorage - these will persist for that browser session only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 feature requests from review_request validated and passing. Live preview URL: https://caramel-pop.preview.emergentagent.com. Extension zip at /caramel-popcorn-extension.zip (20339 bytes, all required files present). data-testid coverage is excellent - use sidebar selectors nav-{route}, page selectors {route}-page, item cards item-card-<id>, favorites favorite-btn-<id>. App uses localStorage as chrome.storage.local stand-in; seeded on first load. No backend calls in flow. AI features are intentionally mocked stubs.
